word: G2006 - ἐπιτήδειος - epitḗdeios - ep-ee-tay'-di-os - Things which are needful

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Things which are needful
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From ἐπιτηδές epitēdes (enough); serviceable, that is, (by implication) requisite: - things which are needful.
